text: Tertiary Minerals outlines silver target at Zambia project. Tertiary Minerals PLC (AIM:TYM, OTC:TTIRF, FRA:TMU) has published an exploration target for a silver, copper and zinc prospect in Zambia, estimating it could contain between 15 and 30 million tonnes of mineralisation at an average grade of 40 to 60 grams per tonne silver equivalent. This is an early-stage estimate of the potential scale of a deposit, and further drilling is needed before the company can confirm whether economic quantities of metal are present.
